Title: Mind Mind Game Game
Description:
There is another element which is missing, or drawn into the other two:
games of mind. "Bluff" would be another term, or "second-guessing".
Poker is chance, but the real game is convincing other players what
chance has befallen you -- and this may have nothing to do with the
cards in your hand. Even chess, with no hidden information, may hide
traps and feints: the mechanics are complex enough that a player can
conceal his strategy in a maze of future possibility.
